name: What Changed?
description: Compare a recent window with its baseline and distinguish new facts, revisions, and repeated coverage.

name: Source Comparison
description: Compare agreement, omissions, contradictions, framing, and timing across sources.

name: Event Validation
description: Resolve and corroborate an event while detecting recycled, misdated, weak, or revised claims.

name: Asset and Entity Exposure
description: Map documented and inferred direct or indirect exposure with counterfactors and horizons.

name: Geopolitical and Operational Risk
description: Build scenario-based impact paths, assumptions, counterfactors, and leading indicators.

name: Weekly Most Consequential Developments
description: Deduplicate and rank a week's developments with a versioned materiality rubric.
